items.name_en: Original Fendi iconic Baguette medium handbag, grey canvas material, embroidered with color-block yarn FF embossed pattern. Dark brown leather trim, adorned with FF buckle. Features front flap, magnetic snap, internal compartment, zip pocket, and vintage gold hardware. Bag comes with removable handle and shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over shoulder, or crossbody. Dimensions 27*15*6cm🐝🐝600M75

items.name_en: Original Fendi latest denim embroidery Baguette. The denim Baguette is definitely a fashion hit this summer! Denim looks great and has a high appearance rate; it's perfect for styling. It's very lightweight and has great capacity, easily meeting daily needs. Comes with a short strap and a wide strap, can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or handheld. Very versatile, easy to handle any style. Wear it and you'll be the brightest goddess in the crowd!

FEND1 launches the new fashion statement Kan U handbag, cleverly balancing functionality and modernity. The entire bag features a relief design, offering a great visual and tactile feel. items.name_en: Original Fendi Small First in Monogram is here!!
items.name_cn:
Original Fendi Small First in Monogram is here!!
Under the direction of designer Kim Jones, this is the first Fendi bag, overturning the previous bag shape. The metal trim and large Logo lock, combined with the body design, combine architectural deconstruction with fashion. Elegant yet cool, it grabs attention instantly! Perfect for clutching at evening events, and also gives a high-end street chic feel when crossbody!
Large: 127B98 Size 32.5x15x23.5cm
Small: 129B88 Size 26x9.5x18cm

Small 🔥🔥🔥
